nasb.text: Then the king of Israel said to Jehoshaphat, “Did I not tell you that he would not prophesy good concerning me, but evil?”

esv.text: And the king of Israel said to Jehoshaphat, “Did I not tell you that he would not prophesy good concerning me, but evil?”

cnv.text: 以色列王對約沙法說：“我不是告訴過你，這人對我說的預言，總不說吉話，只說凶話嗎？”

ccb.text: 以色列王对约沙法说：“我不是告诉过你吗？他给我的预言都是有凶无吉。”
